prompt: A highly realistic video game screenshot in the style of a {argument name="game style" default="Western open-world game"}. Third-person over-the-shoulder view of a rugged cowboy walking away from the camera, wearing a weathered brown jacket, dark pants, a gun holster, and a classic cowboy hat. To his left is a saddled {argument name="horse type" default="dark horse with white spots"}. The setting is a {argument name="environment" default="dusty desert landscape with dry tall grass, dirt trails, cacti, and towering red rock mesas"} during a {argument name="time of day" default="vibrant golden hour sunset"}. In the hazy background, two distant silhouetted figures stand on the dirt path. The image features a video game HUD overlay: in the bottom left corner, a circular minimap with a player arrow and two red blips; in the bottom right corner, three lines of white text with button prompt icons reading 'DRAW WEAPON [RT]', 'HORSE CARGO [Cross D-pad]', and 'TENNESSEE WALKER [LT]'.
translatedPrompt: 一张高度写实的电子游戏截图，风格为 {argument name="game style" default="西部开放世界游戏"}。采用第三人称越肩视角，画面中一位粗犷的牛仔背对镜头行走，身穿磨损的棕色夹克、深色长裤，腰间配有枪套，头戴经典牛仔帽。他的左侧是一匹配有马鞍的 {argument name="horse type" default="带有白斑的黑马"}。场景设定在 {argument name="time of day" default="充满活力的黄金时段日落"} 下的 {argument name="environment" default="尘土飞扬的沙漠景观，伴有干枯的高草、泥土小径、仙人掌和高耸的红岩台地"}。在朦胧的背景中，两条远处的剪影伫立在泥土小径上。图像包含电子游戏 HUD 叠加层：左下角是一个带有玩家箭头和两个红色光点的圆形小地图；右下角有三行白色文字及按钮提示图标，分别显示“DRAW WEAPON [RT]”、“HORSE CARGO [Cross D-pad]”和“TENNESSEE WALKER [LT]”。

breakdown.creativeCore: 西部开放世界游戏截图：生成一张写实的第三人称电子游戏截图，画面包含沙漠景观中的牛仔及其坐骑，并带有 HUD 元素。
breakdown.subject: 人物
constraints: 过度真实导致细节瑕疵显眼
breakdown.bestUse: App Store 截图、产品概念、移动工具界面

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a UI/界面 image for [用途/受众].

Main subject:
[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[景别/角度/版式层级/主体位置]。

Visual style:
[参考风格: realistic]。

Lighting and camera:
[参考光线镜头: golden hour, camera]。

Text requirements:
包含文字或排版元素。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
